description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a symmetrical facade and a prominent central entryway. The house features a dark, multi-gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls, likely made of brick or siding. A curved driveway leads from the main road to the front entrance, which is accentuated by a small porch with columns. The rear of the house includes a bay window extension, adding architectural interest and extra interior space. Windows are arranged in a balanced pattern on both the front and rear, with the front entry flanked by two sets of windows. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn and a paved road running along one edge.
description: A single-story suburban house with a dark gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entry porch, set on a grassy lot with a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, symmetrical windows, and the curved driveway leading from the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the driveway curving around, and the bay window extension at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bay window extension and the back lawn, with the road visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side wall, the driveway, and the bay window protruding from the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay window at rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with small porch, columns, and a curved driveway approach
